purpose: Rebuild Command Center as compact interactive live review queue with rotating snapshots, selected-patient review basis, sidebar metrics, and conservative guardrails.
score_policy: Case-level demo values use Review Score 0-10 only. No static ICU-12 high-risk percentage display.
features: Top bar with platform name and nav
ICU-12 varies across snapshots and is not always highest priority
claim_guardrail: Decision support only. Not intended to diagnose, direct treatment, replace clinician judgment, or independently trigger escalation.
raw_data_policy: No raw row-level MIMIC, eICU, HiRID, CSV, parquet, zip, or local private files committed.
